feed.description: Scuba diving stories and skills: safety, marine life, travel, and calm thinking underwater.
feed.title: Below the Surface

bullets: Welcome back to Below the Surface. Today we're talking about wreck diving, and I'm joined by Marco Sylva, technical diver and underwater archaeologist. Marco Sylva, thanks for being here.
Thanks, Rina. Excited for this one — wreck-diving fundamentals is something I've been thinking about a lot.
What does the failure mode look like? What's something you used to believe about this that you've revised?
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Below the Surface. Today we're talking about wreck diving, and I'm joined by Marco Sylva, technical diver and underwater archaeologist. Marco Sylva, thanks for being here.
summary.title: Wreck Diving Fundamentals
